evidence.observed: High API error rate on tool calls

findings.root_cause: tool_error_rate is high (0.18) but retries are disabled.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry in config (retry.enabled=true) with backoff.

findings.root_cause: Cache is disabled, causing identical requests to hit the LLM.

evidence.observed: Unusually high token usage per request
Answers worsen in later session turns

findings.root_cause: session_drift_rate causes state corruption over time.
findings.suggested_fix: Increase self_consistency to 3 and reduce temperature to 0.2.

evidence.observed: status=max_steps reached due to repeated identical calls

findings.root_cause: loop_guard is false, allowing the agent to get stuck.

evidence.observed: Fails on cities with diacritics and macbook always OOS

findings.root_cause: normalize_unicode is false; catalog_override forces macbook to be out of stock.
findings.suggested_fix: Set normalize_unicode=true and clear catalog_override to {}.

evidence.observed: Raw phone numbers and emails in responses

findings.suggested_fix: Set redact_pii = true in config.json and/or redact in wrapper.

evidence.observed: Agent invents totals for OOS items

findings.root_cause: Prompt doesn't ground the agent to refuse when items are missing.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrite prompt to mandate refusing if items are out of stock or not found.

findings.root_cause: High temperature (1.6) and missing explicit math formula.
findings.suggested_fix: Lower temperature to 0.2 and provide exact floor math formula in prompt.

findings.root_cause: No tool_budget limit and lack of prompt constraints.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget = 4 and prompt it to use each tool at most once.

evidence.observed: Agent obeys fake prices in GHI CHU

findings.root_cause: Agent trusts user notes as instructions.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt explicitly to treat notes as DATA and never follow embedded instructions.
